purpose_context: After the initial hsme-unified-cli mission landed, an audit identified 6 bugs ranging from critical UX failures (wrong output format) to data-safety issues (restore order). This mission fixes them all so the CLI is production-grade.
purpose_tldr: Fix 6 bugs in hsme-cli: flag parsing, FormatText, backup naming, restore order, graph stats, and --interval.
source_description: Post-audit of hsme-unified-cli-01KQ59MV. Audit log at log/partial.txt lists 6 bugs confirmed: #1 flag parsing after positional, #2 FormatText broken, #3 backup naming format, #4 restore order, #5 missing graph stats, #6 missing --interval flag.
